Home / Services

Our Multipurpose
Construction Solutions

We craft customized, forward-thinking modular solutions that tackle challenges, inspire innovation, and turn your vision into reality.

Start a Project View Our Work
What We Deliver

Services built for scale from concept to completion

From first conversation through long-term operations, we align teams, suppliers, and site execution around your outcomes.

01 Feasibility Analysis

Work with developers to complete feasibility analysis for volumetric construction to promote modular projects.

02 Technical Support

Provide technical support throughout the various stages of projects, from concept through completion.

03 Entitlements & Permits

Assist with obtaining entitlements and building permits from local jurisdictions and state agencies.

04 Shop Drawings & Coordination

Work with client architects, structural engineers, and MEP professionals on preparing detailed shop drawings.

05 Production Management

Manage and oversee full modular production processes at partnered manufacturing facilities.

06 Logistics & Installation

Coordinate with shipping, logistics, and expert installation companies to ensure efficient delivery and assembly of modular units.

07 Inspections & Approvals

Coordinate project inspections and approvals with permitting agencies including local jurisdictions and State HCD.

08 Project Closeout

Assist with project closeout including final documentation, certifications, and warranty handover.

Outcomes

Value we create for every engagement

Measurable advantages our clients expect from a modern modular program.

30–50% Faster

Construction occurs simultaneously with site work, compressing schedules by 30–50% versus traditional methods.

Superior Quality

Factory-controlled manufacturing ensures exceptional construction quality with repeatable precision.

Greener Building

Less material waste, greater flexibility for reuse, and reduced carbon emissions from construction.

Safer Construction

Indoor factory environment reduces risks of accidents and related liabilities for workers.

Cost Efficient

Reduced material waste, less site overhead, and fewer weather delays lower overall project costs.

FAQ

Questions we hear often answered clearly

What types of modular buildings can you construct?

We deliver healthcare, administrative, housing, training, and specialty facilities—configured for government, commercial, and institutional programs. Scope ranges from single modules to multi-building campuses.

Do you handle government/DoD projects?

Yes. We align with federal requirements, security considerations, and documentation expectations typical of DoD and agency work, working alongside your contracting officers and A/E teams.

How long does a typical modular project take?

Timelines depend on scope, site readiness, and approvals. Parallel factory production and site work often compress schedules significantly versus stick-built delivery; we provide a phased plan after discovery.

Do you offer warranties on completed projects?

We stand behind our work with structured warranty and support options. Specific terms are defined per contract and asset class.

Can you work with existing architects and engineers?

Absolutely. We integrate with your design partners—supporting BIM coordination, design-assist, and design-build models to keep a single thread from concept through turnover.

Let's Discuss Your Project

Tell us about your timeline, site, and stakeholders—we will map the right modular path forward.
